title: Integrate HTML import feature into URichEditor
description: Add HTML import feature to frontend/components/U/URichEditor.vue following the pattern in TipTapEditor.vue. Ensure both editors have HTML import functionality. Add 'HTML↑' button, showImportHtml modal, and applyHtml logic.
acceptance_criteria: Static Page editor (URichEditor) has a button to import HTML.
Blog/Product editor (TipTapEditor) has a button to import HTML.
Both work correctly: pasting HTML replaces or sets the editor content.
Code is clean, following existing component patterns and using CSS variables.
